description:
Last Paid helps you remember what a product cost the last time you bought it. Scan a barcode, save the price, store, date, and notes, then pull that history back up the next time you shop.

Use Last Paid to:
- scan common retail barcodes with the camera
- save a full price history for each product
- compare the latest price with the previous one at a glance
- search by barcode, product name, or recent store
- add purchases manually when you cannot scan
- optionally tag where you bought an item

Last Paid is designed to stay simple and local-first, so your saved price history lives on your device.
